title: A Real-time Point Cloud Segmentation System with Optimized Ground Estimation Algorithm and Selective Neural Network
venue: IEEE International Symposium on Circuits and Systems (ISCAS 2025), London, UK
abstract: This paper introduces a fast and accurate point segmentation system for real-time 3D-LiDAR semantic segmentation. A selective point segmentation (SPS) system is proposed with adaptive ground estimation, coarse-grained entropy-and-density-based region skipping, and fine-grained bin skipping. The system achieves 42.24 ms processing time and 90.69% accuracy on the SemanticKITTI dataset.

title: BEVSA: A Real-Time Bird's-Eye-View Semantic Segmentation Accelerator for Multi-Camera System
venue: IEEE Design Automation Conference (DAC 2025), San Francisco, USA
abstract: A bird's-eye-view semantic segmentation accelerator (BEVSA) for real-time 3D space perception in multi-camera systems. Implements block-decomposed hierarchical BEV pooling (43.2× speedup) and coarse-to-fine-grained zero skipping convolution, achieving 23.1 FPS in 28nm technology with 167.4× higher energy efficiency over edge computing platforms.

title: Optimized Real-time Point Cloud Segmentation System
venue: ISE Winter Conference & Advanced Semiconductor Technology Workshop 2025
